basic_details.job_title: POWERGRID Officer Trainee Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID)
basic_details.short_information: Power Grid Corporation of India Limited (POWERGRID) has officially announced the Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. The detailed notification was published on 29 April 2026 at www.powergrid.in . Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 33 years (with age relaxation for ST) and hold an Associate Membership of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India can now submit their online applications from 29 April 2026 to 19 May 2026. Direct links to download the notification and apply online are shared below.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 33 years (inclusive of 5 years relaxation for ST)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 33 years (inclusive of 5 years relaxation for ST) Age Relaxation: ST - 5 years, PwBD ST - 15 years

qualification.education_qualification: Associate Member of Institute of Company Secretaries of India
qualification.details: Associate Member of Institute of Company Secretaries of India

salary_details.pay_scale: During Training: Rs. 40,000/- basic + perks. After regularization: E2 scale Rs. 50,000/- - 1,60,000/-
salary_details.details: During Training: Basic Pay of Rs. 40,000/- along with extant IDA, HRA and perks @12% of basic pay. On successful completion of training and upon regularization: Officer at E-2 level in Executive Cadre. Basic pay on Regularization: Rs. 50,000/- 3%- 1,60,000/- (IDA)

selection_process: Written Test / Computer Based Test Document Verification Group Discussion Behavioral Assessment Personal Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the POWERGRID Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 19-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of POWERGRID to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the POWERGRID Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for online submission of the application form is 19th May 2026. Ensure your application is submitted before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for this post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be an Associate Member of the Institute of Company Secretaries of India to be eligible for the Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit is 33 years. This includes a relaxation of 5 years for candidates belonging to the ST category.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) post?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy for the Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) position in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered to the selected candidates?
faq.answer: During training, the basic pay is Rs. 40,000/- plus perks. Upon regularization, candidates will be placed in the E2 scale, ranging from Rs. 50,000/- to Rs. 1,60,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is entirely online. Candidates need to register and apply through the official POWERGRID website.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Officer Trainee (Company Secretary) role?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves a Written Test/Computer Based Test, Document Verification, Group Discussion, Behavioral Assessment, and a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for the ST category?
faq.answer: As per the notification, candidates belonging to the ST category are exempted from paying the application fee.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: You can find the links to the official notification and the online application form in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the cut-off date for determining eligibility criteria?
faq.answer: The cut-off date for determining eligibility criteria, including age and qualifications, is 19th May 2026.
